metadata.description: Memstead — installable expertise for AI agents: typed, versioned knowledge graphs in markdown + git

plugins.name: memstead
plugins.description: Work with Memstead knowledge graphs from Claude Code — typed, schema-validated markdown graphs your agent reads and grows over MCP. Install, then run /setup once per workspace. Commands for setup, interview, bulk ingest, recall, sync/verify, and graph upkeep — or just talk to Claude; the MCP tools are always live.
